name: nullable_optional_int_float_round_claims
description: M3a CLAIMED (scored nullable): optional int (int | null), JSON float 1.6 -> the non-null arm coerces to 2 with FloatToInt (score 1). Native now scores the arm against the null arm (DefaultButHadValue 110) and CLAIMS the arm because 1 < 110. want captured from live BAML final parse.
